action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 23 training failed with RuntimeError: cannot pin 'torch.cuda.DoubleTensor' only dense CPU tensors can be pinned, due to moving tensors to CUDA in collate_fn when pin_memory=True. Analysis: Fix is to set pin_memory=False in DataLoader and keep collate on CPU. Also attention mask must be boolean, and predict.py must use current ee_state for absolute target conversion. Decision: Write train_v6.py with these fixes, test forward pass, then train for 2 epochs on 200 episodes to produce a LoRA adapter checkpoint. After training, submit eval using updated predict.py to measure first non-zero success rate.
